recent.statement: A significant earthquake will occur in the region of Puerto Madero, Mexico within the next week
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports a significant earthquake at Puerto Madero, Mexico during the window, and such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will occur in the Pacific Ring of Fire within the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal documents any major earthquake in the Pacific Ring of Fire during the window, and such an event would certainly have been recorded.

recent.statement: Oil prices (WTI/Brent) will rise above $105/bbl due to escalating Red Sea attacks disrupting shipping.
recent.evidence: WTI is at $88.36 and Brent at ~$96, both well below the $105/bbl threshold, so the forecasted price rise did not occur.

recent.statement: Donald Trump will announce that Jon Ossof and Raphael Warnock are illegitimate Senators by the end of the week
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows Trump making any such announcement, and an event this notable would certainly have been captured within the window.

recent.statement: A Category 1 tropical cyclone will make landfall in the Philippines
recent.evidence: The only cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are located far from the Philippines with zero Category 1 population impact, and no signal shows any Category 1 landfall in the Philippines within the window.

recent.statement: WTI crude oil prices will rise above $95/bbl due to ongoing Red Sea attacks disrupting shipping.
recent.evidence: WTI crude was 88.36 $/bbl, well below the $95/bbl threshold, so the forecast did not come true.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Florida within the next week
recent.evidence: The only tropical cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are green alerts with zero population affected and are located far from Florida, showing no Florida landfall occurred.

recent.statement: S&P 500 futures will drop below 7400 due to heightened geopolitical risk aversion
recent.evidence: No signal reports S&P 500 futures level; the only equity signal (S12, Nasdaq 100 at 28420.75) does not show S&P 500 falling below 7400, and oil prices actually declined, contradicting the geopolitical-panic premise.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike the South Island of New Zealand within the next week
recent.evidence: No signal was captured concerning this forecast, and a major earthquake would certainly have been recorded, so the event did not occur within the window.

recent.statement: Shipping disruptions in the Kerch Strait due to proximity to Ukraine conflict
recent.evidence: S6 shows Kerch Strait at 2 daily transits, 73% below its 30-day average, with a nearby Russia-Ukraine conflict flag, evidencing the forecast shipping disruption.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will occur in the Pacific Ring of Fire within the next week, causing significant damage and loss of life.
recent.evidence: No admissible signal reports a major earthquake with significant damage and loss of life in the Pacific Ring of Fire during the window, so an event that large would have been captured but was not.

recent.statement: A major flood will occur in the UK
recent.evidence: No signal reports a major flood occurring in the UK during the window, and such an event would certainly have been captured.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
